objective: Prove that runner-owned manifest completion fields are written by freeze-contract, gate-generator, and gate-close on a clean automatic harness run.
blocking_rule: If any touched path outside the current run artifact directory is required, stop and narrow the run instead of guessing.
in_scope: Use only the sprint-008 run directory as touched scope.
Drive the run through freeze-contract, gate-generator, and gate-close.
Verify that manifest completion fields are produced by the runner.
out_of_scope: Any harness changes outside the sprint-008 run directory.
Manual edits to manifest completion fields.

acceptance_criteria.statement: freeze-contract writes its own completion evidence into manifest.
gate-generator writes its own completion evidence into manifest.
gate-close writes passed status and completed_gates into manifest.

evaluator_checks: The run uses only its own artifact directory as scope.
The run passes the full freeze-contract to gate-close flow.
